name: Sourdough Applesauce Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the starter, milk, flour, and applesauce in a covered bowl placed in a warm area.
2. In a separate bowl, cream together the sugars and butter. Add the beaten egg and mix well.
3. Gradually add the spices. You may also incorporate half a cup of raisins or chopped nuts, or a mixture of both.
4. Beat by hand until everything is well combined and no lumps remain.
5. Pour the batter into a greased cake pan and bake at 350 degrees F for 30 to 45 minutes.
6. Test for doneness with a knife after 30 minutes. Allow the cake to cool completely before cutting and serving.
